title: Contact us about your GST/HST return - Canada.ca
content:
## Contact us about your GST/HST return
Get in touch with us if you have questions or feedback.

## Questions about filing or your account
If your question relates to a GST/HST access code, find out if you need an access code .
In your Canada Revenue Agency (CRA) business account, you can:
- Find filing dates and return status
- Get information about your account
Call the CRA by phone or teletypewriter (TTY) if you:
- Need help filing your return
- Have questions specific to your file
When you call, you will need to have your tax information ready to confirm your identity.
If you’re calling on behalf of someone else, you must be authorized to call on their behalf.
For details: Authorize a representative
- All Canadian provinces and operator-assisted relay services: 1-800-959-5525 1-800-959-5525 (opens up phone application)
- Yukon, Northwest Territories and Nunavut: 1-866-841-1876 (opens up phone application) 1-866-841-1876
- Outside Canada/U.S.: 1-613-940-8497 (opens up phone application) 1-613-940-8497
- Information if you use a TTY

## If you need to submit a document
Find out how to file your GST/HST return electronically or by mail .
You can send us other documents and forms online or by mail:
In your CRA business account, you can:
- Send us documents by choosing Submit documents
Check your form or return to see if there is a mailing address listed.
If there is no address listed, or to mail us other documents, you can find a CRA mailing address .

## If you have a complaint
If you are not satisfied with the service you received or you disagree with the CRA, you have different options.
- If you are not satisfied with the service that you receive from us, refer to Send feedback about CRA services
- If you disagree with an assessment, determination, or decision, refer to File an objection – goods and services tax/harmonized sales tax (GST/HST)
- If you believe that you have been subject to reprisal, refer to Reprisal Complaints

## Feedback about the CRA's online filing services
If you have suggestions about how we can improve GST/HST NETFILE or GST/HST Internet File Transfer, or if you have feedback about filing GST/HST returns through your CRA account, send us your thoughts.
To share your feedback, email us at netcom@cra-arc.gc.ca .
If you do email us, do not share personal or confidential information such as your business information or your access code. These emails are not encrypted.
Do not expect a reply. In particular, we will not respond to questions about your own or your business's income tax situation. For questions about taxes or to make changes to your account, contact us by phone .

## Liaison officer support for small businesses
Certain small and medium-sized businesses can get help to understand their tax obligations through our Liaison Officer service. This is a voluntary program. If you participate, a liaison officer will help you:
- Understand your tax obligations
- Find out where you can get more information
- Learn the common mistakes businesses make
- Get answers to your questions
Refer to: Liaison Officer service

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
